name: chain_gov_contract_this_time_and_materials_
method: [GOV CONTRACT] THIS TIME AND MATERIALS (T&M) TASK ORDER IS ISSUED FOR "EDITORIAL AND PUBLICATION SUPPORT SERVICES" IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE ATTACHED PERFORMA (deadline: 2026-09-30)

stages.task: Hit SAM.gov /opportunities/v2/search API daily. Filter: T&M type, active, keywords editorial/publication/writing/communications/content. Also check GSA eBuy.
Score each opp: deadline proximity (>14d), ceiling ($50K+), NAICS match, set-aside eligibility (small biz preferred). Score 1-10, keep 6+.
For each qualified opp: find the agency's past awards, identify prime contractors already holding similar IDIQs. Extract company names + BD contact emails from SAM.gov entity search.
Use claude -p to generate: (1) tailored capability statement, (2) 1-page proposal outline referencing their SOW language, (3) subcontractor pitch email. All in 90 seconds.
Send subcontractor pitch emails to prime BD contacts. CC to any posted POC. Track in GOV_OPPORTUNITIES.csv with sent date, response status.
